news.t: Vanguard Launches Core-Plus Bond Index ETF (BNDP)

overview.description: The Vanguard Core-Plus Bond Index ETF (BNDP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund tracks a broad index of market value-weighted fixed income securities, rated investment-grade or high-yield. The fund consists of fully taxable, USD-denominated bonds with maturities of at least one year. BNDP was launched on Dec 2, 2025 and is issued by Vanguard.
infoTable: Bloomberg U.S. Universal Float Adjusted Index

data.title: Vanguard Launches Core-Plus Bond Index ETF (BNDP)
data.text: VALLEY FORGE, Pa., Dec. 4, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Vanguard today announced the launch of Vanguard Core-Plus Bond Index ETF (BNDP), a new fixed income offering designed to deliver broad, diversified expo...
